title: Micron Technology, Inc. Reports Record Results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal 2026
note: Primary IR release confirms record FQ3, large cash generation, high capex, and AI memory scarcity read-through for HBM/DRAM/NAND peers.

title: Micron and General Motors Sign Strategic Agreement to Secure Supply and Accelerate Innovation
note: IR homepage lists GM supply agreement after the Anthropic agreement; strengthens theme that large customers are seeking longer-term memory supply certainty.

title: Sandisk Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results
note: Public release metadata shows FQ3 revenue above guide, sharp datacenter growth, pricing strength, and a new buyback; useful NAND/SSD peer read-through for WDC/MU/STX.

title: Sandisk's stock could follow record-breaking quarter with another big jump, analysts say
note: Accessible summary says analysts focused on more favorable long-term agreement structures, stronger pricing lock-in, and enterprise SSD/datacenter demand; treat as secondary sentiment, not primary company guidance.

title: WD Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results
note: Primary IR release confirms HDD/storage cycle strength, high gross margin, strong free cash flow, and Q4 growth guide; reinforces WDC/STX storage-capacity sympathy.

title: Seagate Technology Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results
note: Primary release confirms strong FQ3 revenue, high gross margin, free cash flow, and capital return; supports mass-capacity HDD and HAMR data-center theme.

title: Honeywell Technologies Launches as Independent, Pure-Play Automation Company Following Completion of Honeywell Aerospace Spin-Off
note: Primary IR update confirms post-spin HON is automation-focused; aerospace and space-supply-chain exposure now sits mainly with separately traded Honeywell Aerospace, so monitor HON/HONA entity confusion.

title: Honeywell Aerospace completes spin-off from Honeywell Technologies and begins trading on Nasdaq
note: Primary aerospace-company release says HONA is the independent aerospace and defense supplier; legacy HON space/avionics read-through should be treated cautiously after spin.

title: STMicroelectronics and SpaceX celebrate a decade-long collaboration enabling Starlink connectivity
note: Primary ST source confirms direct SpaceX/Starlink collaboration using custom chips for satellites, user terminals, and gateways; removes need to label this STM relationship as merely inferred.

title: STMicroelectronics Expects its Space Business to Reach More than $3B Over Three Years
note: Secondary sector source says STM targets more than $3B of space revenue over 2026-2028 and identifies Starlink-related custom chips; useful for satellite supply-chain context.

title: ASML reports €8.8 billion total net sales and €2.8 billion net income in Q1 2026
note: Primary ASML release confirms Q1 strength, high gross margin, and raised FY26 sales range; supports upstream advanced-node AI capex theme while export-control risk remains live.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Reports First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2027 Financial Results
note: Primary IR release confirms record operating cash flow and AI/data-center execution; keep watching optical, switching, and custom silicon as high-beta AI infrastructure read-throughs.

title: Nebius reports first quarter 2026 financial results
note: Primary release supports AI cloud capacity/buildout thesis; keep risk flag high because capex, financing, and hyperscaler competition drive trading volatility.

title: Applied Digital Reports Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Results
note: IR site lists Q3 2026 earnings release, webcast, and 10-Q for quarter ended Feb. 28, 2026; AI/HPC data-center infrastructure remains the core theme, but execution and financing risk require small-size treatment.

title: AI Data Centers In North Dakota? That's No Problem For AAON Stock.
note: Accessible secondary source ties AAON cooling demand to Applied Digital North Dakota AI data centers; useful supply-chain context for cooling/power infrastructure, not company guidance.

title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for First Quarter Fiscal 2027
note: Primary release confirms record revenue, data-center scale, and high gross margin; still the sector anchor for AI hardware, networking, memory, and server-OEM sympathy.

title: Dell Technologies Delivers First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Financial Results
note: Primary release PDF confirms large AI orders, AI server revenue, and higher FY27 AI server revenue expectations; direct confirmation for NVDA/AMD/MRVL/storage demand.

title: HP Inc. Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results
note: Primary release confirms PC revenue growth but leaves HPQ as downstream memory-cost pressure check rather than a clean AI-memory beneficiary.

title: HPE reports fiscal 2026 second quarter results
note: Primary release confirms strong Networking and Cloud & AI revenue growth; lower-beta confirmation for AI infrastructure breadth and data-center networking demand.

title: Broadcom Inc. Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results and Quarterly Dividend
note: Primary release confirms Q2 AI semiconductor revenue growth from custom accelerators and AI networking; key AVGO/MRVL/NVDA sector confirmation but expectations risk remains elevated.

title: HP and OpenAI Announce Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate the Future of Work
note: Primary HP source adds an AI-workplace catalyst on top of PC refresh themes; useful for HPQ sentiment, but memory-cost pressure remains the cleaner read-through for MU/WDC/SNDK/STX.

title: AMD to Report Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
note: IR calendar/source review indicates Q2 results are the next major AMD catalyst; monitor MI/Instinct, EPYC, margin, and AI accelerator guidance rather than generic AI sympathy.

title: ASML financial calendar and Q2 2026 results watch
note: Primary investor calendar/source review keeps ASML on near-term catalyst watch for Q2 orders, China/export-control commentary, EUV/High-NA demand, and advanced-node AI capex read-through.

title: Sandisk investor-relations source review after post-spin trading strength
note: IR source review flags post-spin overhang and lock-up/holder-flow risk alongside strong enterprise SSD/NAND demand; use as risk context for SNDK and WDC rather than new operating guidance.

title: Western Digital investor-relations source review after Sandisk separation
note: Primary IR review confirms WDC remains the HDD storage-capacity expression after the Sandisk separation; SNDK shareholder-flow headlines can still create sympathy or distraction.

title: Applied Digital fiscal Q4 2026 catalyst watch
note: IR review keeps APLD on high-beta AI data-center catalyst watch; next useful updates are customer commitments, financing, construction, power, and energization milestones, not broad AI headlines.

title: Nebius AI cloud source review after Q1 2026 results
note: Primary newsroom review finds no fresher operating release than Q1; keep NBIS focused on GPU-cloud capacity, financing, customer concentration, and hyperscaler competitive risk.

title: Recent Starlink launch cadence source review
note: SpaceX launch activity supports inferred LEO satellite supply-chain monitoring across semis, optics, networking, storage, and ground infrastructure. STM has separately sourced direct Starlink chip context; other ticker links remain inferred themes.

title: VanEck Semiconductor ETF holdings review
note: ETF holdings review keeps SMH best used as sector breadth confirmation; concentration in AI hardware, memory, equipment, and networking means it can validate multi-name moves but is less precise than single-stock catalysts.

title: Micron and Ford Sign Strategic Agreement to Strengthen Long-Term Memory Supply and Industry Resilience
note: Primary IR source adds Ford to Micron's strategic customer agreement pattern; reinforces durable automotive memory/storage supply visibility after Anthropic and GM agreements.

title: Applied Digital Delivers Second Building at Polaris Forge 1
note: Primary release says Building 2 Phase 1 is ready for service, adding 75 MW and bringing Polaris Forge 1 live capacity to 175 MW; strengthens execution watch but financing/customer concentration risk remains.

title: STMicroelectronics announces timing for Second Quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call
note: Primary source sets July 23 Q2 earnings catalyst; monitor recovery tone, auto/industrial softness, power/sensor demand, and any space/Starlink-related commentary.

title: Honeywell Technologies to Release Second Quarter Financial Results, Discuss 2026 Outlook and Hold Its Investor Conference Call on Thursday, July 23
note: Primary source confirms first post-spin HON/Honeywell Technologies earnings catalyst on July 23; use to reset automation-focused comparables and avoid confusing HON with spun Honeywell Aerospace exposure.

note: Primary IR event materials keep HPE focused on networking, Cloud & AI, and Juniper integration; useful lower-beta confirmation for AI networking breadth, not a new earnings guide.

title: The Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA Advances Supercomputing-Class Infrastructure Powering the Next Generation of HPC and AI
